verses.text: The kings gather to fight Joshua. The kings. The land unites against Israel.
The kings gather to fight Joshua. The kings. The land unites against Israel.
The Gibeonites come with old clothes, feigning a far journey. The ruse. Fear breeds deceit.
The Gibeonites come with old clothes, feigning a far journey. The ruse. Fear breeds deceit.
The Gibeonites come with old clothes, feigning a far journey. The ruse. Fear breeds deceit.
The Gibeonites come with old clothes, feigning a far journey. The ruse. Fear breeds deceit.
They say they come from a far country for God's name. The claim. They appeal to His fame.
They say they come from a far country for God's name. The claim. They appeal to His fame.
They say they come from a far country for God's name. The claim. They appeal to His fame.
Their mouldy bread 'proves' their story. The proof. Appearances deceive.
Their mouldy bread 'proves' their story. The proof. Appearances deceive.
Their mouldy bread 'proves' their story. The proof. Appearances deceive.
Their mouldy bread 'proves' their story. The proof. Appearances deceive.
Israel makes peace without asking God. No counsel. They were not careful to inquire.
Israel makes peace without asking God. No counsel. They were not careful to inquire.
Three days later the deceit is found, but the oath holds. Bound. A rash oath must be kept.
Three days later the deceit is found, but the oath holds. Bound. A rash oath must be kept.
Three days later the deceit is found, but the oath holds. Bound. A rash oath must be kept.
They are made hewers of wood and drawers of water. Servants. They live, but in bondage.
They are made hewers of wood and drawers of water. Servants. They live, but in bondage.
They are made hewers of wood and drawers of water. Servants. They live, but in bondage.
Joshua rebukes them; they submit to his mercy. Submit. They cast themselves on grace.
Joshua rebukes them; they submit to his mercy. Submit. They cast themselves on grace.
Joshua rebukes them; they submit to his mercy. Submit. They cast themselves on grace.
Joshua rebukes them; they submit to his mercy. Submit. They cast themselves on grace.
They become servants for the altar of the LORD. Spared. Even deceivers find a place.
They become servants for the altar of the LORD. Spared. Even deceivers find a place.
